judge.reason: Primary purpose is to allocate, configure, and register an input device for mic mute. The refcount operations (input_allocate_device/get, input_free_device/put) are only incidental steps in device creation/cleanup, not the main goal. The function does not expose a reference via return; it stores the pointer internally.
